LongMethod:FollowStreamScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun FollowStreamScreen( allFrames: List<Frame>, anchor: Frame, onBack: () -> Unit, )
LongMethod:FrameDetailScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun FrameDetailScreen( frame: Frame, onBack: () -> Unit, onFollowStream: (Frame) -> Unit = {}, )

LongMethod:FrameListScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun FrameListScreen( sourceName: String, linkType: LinkType, frames: List<Frame>, onSelect: (Frame) -> Unit, onClose: () -> Unit, onShowConversations: () -> Unit = {}, initialFilter: String = "", /** 文件模式预算的 [FilterIndex]，与 frames 平行；为 null 时（流式模式）filter * 回退到 layer 树遍历，见 [FrameFilter] kdoc */ indices: List<FilterIndex>? = null, /** true 时关闭/返回弹确认对话框（监听模式下避免误退导致丢失实时数据） */ confirmClose: Boolean = false, /** 非 null 时顶栏显示「清空」按钮（监听模式下清空已收 frames 但不停 listener） */ onClear: (() -> Unit)? = null, )

LongParameterList:FilterIndex.kt$FilterIndex$( val protocols: Set<String>, val srcIp: String?, val dstIp: String?, val srcPort: Int?, val dstPort: Int?, val sniLower: String?, val httpHostLower: String?, /** HTTP Request line 的 path 部分，已小写化（review v0.6-round2 F-007） */ val httpPathLower: String?, val httpMethodUpper: String?, val dnsNamesLower: List<String>, val appNameLower: String?, )

LongParameterList:FrameListScreen.kt$( sourceName: String, linkType: LinkType, frames: List<Frame>, onSelect: (Frame) -> Unit, onClose: () -> Unit, onShowConversations: () -> Unit = {}, initialFilter: String = "", /** 文件模式预算的 [FilterIndex]，与 frames 平行；为 null 时（流式模式）filter * 回退到 layer 树遍历，见 [FrameFilter] kdoc */ indices: List<FilterIndex>? = null, /** true 时关闭/返回弹确认对话框（监听模式下避免误退导致丢失实时数据） */ confirmClose: Boolean = false, /** 非 null 时顶栏显示「清空」按钮（监听模式下清空已收 frames 但不停 listener） */ onClear: (() -> Unit)? = null, )
